name: anchorfall-desktop
description: MONOLYTHIUM — THE ANCHORFALL — native desktop shell (Electron) around the web game

scripts.dist: npm run build:game && npm run prepare:runtime && electron-builder
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build:game && npm run prepare:runtime && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:game && npm run prepare:runtime && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:game && npm run prepare:runtime && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:game && npm run prepare:runtime && electron-builder --linux
